text: There is nothing impossible to him who will try
author: Alexander the Great

text: The darker the night, the brighter the stars, the deeper the grief, the closer is God!
author: Fyodor Dostoevsky

text: Life is not a problem to be solved but a reality to be experienced.
author: Soren Kierkegaard

text: I think, therefore I am
author: Rene Descartes

text: Be not afraid of greatness. Some are born great, some achieve greatness, and others have greatness thrust upon them.
author: William Shakespeare

text: Pain and suffering are always inevitable for a large intelligence and a deep heart. The really great men must, I think, have great sadness on earth.
author: Fydor Dostoevsky

text: But how could you live and have no story to tell?
author: Fydor Dostoevsky

text: And there is nothing more beautiful than choosing to live rather than simply exist.
author: Unknown

text: The only true wisdom is in knowing you know nothing.
author: Socrates

text: Worrying does not take away tomorrows troubles, it takes away todays peace
author: Randy Armstrong

text: I will either find a way, or make one
author: Hannibal Barca

text: The man who moves a mountain begins by carrying away small stones.
author: Confucius

text: You miss 100 percent of the shots you do not take.
author: Wayne Gretzky

text: Do not watch the clock, do what it does. Keep going.
author: Sam Levenson

text: The journey of a thousand miles begins with one step.
author: Lao Tzu

text: A smooth sea never made a skilled sailor.
author: Franklin D. Roosevelt

text: Fall seven times and stand up eight.
author: Japanese Proverb

text: The only limit to our realization of tomorrow is our doubts of today.
author: Franklin D. Roosevelt

text: He who has a why to live can bear almost any how.
author: Friedrich Nietzsche

text: What we think, we become.
author: Buddha

text: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
author: Steve Jobs

text: Stay hungry, stay foolish.
author: Steve Jobs

text: Knowledge speaks, but wisdom listens.
author: Jimi Hendrix

text: Reality is wrong, dreams are for real.
author: Tupac Shakur

text: Everything should be made as simple as possible, but not simpler.
author: Albert Einstein

text: All of us had to live their lives drunk on something, else we had no cause to keep pushing on.
author: Kenny Ackermann

text: A slave to money holds a whip just so he can act like he owns a slave bought by money. But he is not aware of one thing, the truth is all of us are slaves to something.
author: Askeladd

text: This world is cruel but it's also, it's also beautiful.
author: Mikasa Ackermann

text: My god, a moment of bliss. Why isn't that enough for a lifetime?
author: Fyodor Dostoevsky

text: Life is not a problem to be solved, but a reality to be experienced.
author: Søren Kierkegaard

text: It's not death a man should fear, but he should fear never beginning to live.
author: Marcus Aurelius

text: It takes the whole life to learn how to live, and what will perhaps make you wonder more, it takes the whole of life to learn how to die.
author: Seneca

text: You don't have enemies, the truth is that nobody has them.
author: Thors Snorresson

text: It's better to shoot and miss, than to let time run out and wonder what if.
author: Michael Jordan

text: Believe in yourself.
author: Someone

text: Take the chance and you may lose. Take not a chance, and you have already lost.
author: Søren Kierkegaard

text: Failure is success in progress.
author: Albert Einstein

text: Keep moving forward.
author: Eren Yeager

text: Linux is only free if your time has no value.
author: Jamie Zawinski

text: So Nvidia, fuck you!
author: Linus Torvalds

text: I use Arch btw.
author: Many people

text: Be yourself; everyone else is already taken.
author: Oscar Wilde

text: You only live once, but if you do it right, once is enough.
author: Mae West

text: To live is the rarest thing in the world. Most people exist, that is all.
author: Oscar Wilde

text: The man who does not read has no advantage over the man who cannot read.
author: Mark Twain

text: Life is draining, just gotta make the best of it.
author: Evertiro
